---
title: "gherkin_runner.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\crucible\gherkin_runner.py"
loc: 47
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.95
---

## Intent
The `gherkin_runner.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on EmpireGherkinCrucible, test_uplink_utility_contract, test_uplink_non_ascii_contract, test_muninn_deterministic_routing_contract, test_muninn_low_confidence_uplink_contract. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via EmpireGherkinCrucible, test_uplink_utility_contract, test_uplink_non_ascii_contract, test_muninn_deterministic_routing_contract, test_muninn_low_confidence_uplink_contract. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)

### Exports
- `EmpireGherkinCrucible`
- `test_uplink_utility_contract`
- `test_uplink_non_ascii_contract`
- `test_muninn_deterministic_routing_contract`
- `test_muninn_low_confidence_uplink_contract`
